1000000000100111111110111011010101 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 1 * 01
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0111 = 01 * 11
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01101 = 01 * 101
  10000 = 1 * 0000
  01001111 = 0100 * 1111
  11110111 = 1111 * 0111
  011010101 = 01101 * 0101
  100000000 = 10000 * 0000
  10000000001001111 = 100000000 * 01001111
  11110111011010101 = 11110111 * 011010101
  1000000000100111111110111011010101 = 10000000001001111 * 11110111011010101
